title: hieracium bifidum subsp. perlepidum
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. perlepidum, also known as Perlepid Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its bitter and astringent properties, which are believed to have antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The medicinal properties of Hieracium bifidum subsp. perlepidum are said to promote digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, making it a potential natural remedy for respiratory issues and gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
